mapper.sql: id, record_id, class_stat_id, class_id, category_id, category_code, category_name, category_type, check_round, deduction_count, total_score, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM check_record_category_stats_new WHERE record_id = #{recordId} ORDER BY class_id, check_round, category_id
SELECT FROM check_record_category_stats_new WHERE class_stat_id = #{classStatId} ORDER BY check_round, category_id
SELECT FROM check_record_category_stats_new WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY check_round, category_id
SELECT FROM check_record_category_stats_new WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND category_type = #{categoryType} ORDER BY class_id, check_round
SELECT FROM check_record_category_stats_new WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND check_round = #{checkRound} ORDER BY class_id, category_id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO check_record_category_stats_new ( id, record_id, class_stat_id, class_id, category_id, category_code, category_name, category_type, check_round, deduction_count, total_score, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.recordId}, #{item.classStatId}, #{item.classId}, #{item.categoryId}, #{item.categoryCode}, #{item.categoryName}, #{item.categoryType}, #{item.checkRound}, #{item.deductionCount}, #{item.totalScore}, NOW() )
